title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures · Complexity Checkpoint
summary: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for an amortized-cost ledger and implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound total operation cost over a sequence and derive amortized cost.
Assign credits that cover future expensive operations without negative balances.
Define a nonnegative potential and calculate amortized cost changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
